Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Oth’kimeth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman sealed Oth’kimeth inside himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Oth’kimeth is a Fiend.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Oth’kimeth laughed with Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Oth’kimeth is a Fiend inside the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Oth’kimeth has a blazing red eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Oth’kimeth is a Fiend sealed inside Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Oth’kimeth is a Fiend that can separate from Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Oth’kimeth is known as the Conqueror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Oth’kimeth is a demonic figure with horns arranged into a blood-tipped crown.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Oth’kimeth is a hulking semi-physical form crowned in spikes of bone.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Oth’kimeth is a Fiend that escaped while Suriel was in the Void.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
